name: Nervine tonic | Indications, Pharmacology, Dosage, Side Effects & other Generic info with Available Brand names in Bangladesh
indications: Nervous debility, paralysis, facial paralysis, tremors, epilepsy, arthritis, gout sexual debility.
composition: Each 5 g contains- Strychnos nux-vomica 118.60 mg Piper nigrum 59.30 mg Piper longum 59.30 mg Zingiber officinale 59.30 mg Crocus sativus 59.30 mg Cinnamomum zeylanicum 59.30 mg Nardostachys jatamamsi 59.30 mg Santalum album 59.30 mg other ingredients Q.S.
pharmacology: Majoon Lana is a unique combination of valuable ingredients, which is effective in the treatment of nervous debility, paralysis, facial paralysis, convulsion, epilepsy, arthritis, gout sexual debility.
dosage_amp;_administration: -1 teaspoonful 1-2 time(s) daily or as prescribed by the registered physician.
side_effects: No significant side effect has been observed in therapeutic dosage.
precautions_amp;_warnings: Keep out of reach of children.
storage_conditions: Store in a cool and dry place away from light.
